variables.notes: No explicit depreciation or amortisation row related to COGS/cost of goods sold appears in the operating section before financial lines. Therefore D&A is assumed embedded in the selected COGS row ('Cost of goods sold'), so nothing should be added separately.

No explicit depreciation or amortisation row related to sales and marketing, administration, R&D, or other operating expenses appears in the operating section before financial lines. Rows mentioning impairment/amortization are impairment-related or not usable as separate operating D&A additions under the stated rules. Therefore D&A is assumed embedded in the selected XSGA component rows, and nothing should be added separately.
